name: RABBIT-CAGE-16
title: Fresh install CLAUDE.md triggers false policy-drift detection on first Stop
description: On a freshly installed or cloned workspace, the Stop hook fires 'Policy drift detected — CLAUDE.md regenerated from source files' even though no policy files were modified. The CLAUDE.md generated by install.sh (via generate-claude-md.sh) appears to differ from what the hook expects, causing a spurious regeneration on the very first session stop. Root cause is likely a mismatch between the CLAUDE.md produced at install time and the canonical output that the drift-detection check computes at runtime.

history.note: Fixed: split absent-file vs drift branches in rbt-sync-check.sh; absent CLAUDE.md now emits first-run message (📋 ━━━ [rabbit] Policy initialized...) instead of false 'drift detected'. Also addressed BACKLOG-7 in same dispatch.
